name: sentinel
title: Sentinel — Pre-action On-chain Risk Skill
description: A reusable Pharos AgentSkill that any agent calls before moving value: returns a risk verdict (safe/caution/dangerous) + reasons, and a risk-gated execution plan. Reads Pharos Atlantic on-chain data.

tools.name: risk_check
tools.summary: Assess risk of interacting with an address. RPC-only signals: contract-vs-EOA, EIP-1167/1967/1822 proxy detection, bytecode opcode analysis (SELFDESTRUCT/unguarded DELEGATECALL), ownership & upgrade-admin concentration (owner()+EIP-1967 admin, EOA vs contract), ERC-20 introspection (symbol/decimals/supply, zero-supply trap), pausable state, tiny-bytecode stubs, and action/target mismatches.

tools.name: execution_plan
tools.summary: Risk-gated plan: approve/block + bounded params within caller tolerance.
